title: Static
pitch: You are a radio ghost: drag a tuner dial to phase between three overlapping frequency-worlds of the same map.
howto: Drift the dead zone and hoover up scrap. Each band hides different predators and loot — the storm band pays best but drains your signal. Retune to escape chasers (the dial must recharge), bank everything, buy bandwidth and antenna upgrades, and log all 9 anomaly signals.
controls: Drag anywhere to drift. Drag the tuner dial or tap a band chip to retune. Desktop: WASD move, 1/2/3 retune.
